messages.author: Skicka
messages.text: We made a series of small LoRs nodes that use the petite 128x32 screen, which is automatically recognized but smashed. I'm dying to give these some life, and my goal would be to teach a soldering intro to Meshcore classes at Chaos Communication Congress with them if I could get a version of Meshcore working. Would anyone be up for getting limited support working on this Smoll screen? I can donate a bunch of hardware and some coffee funding for any help!
messages.content_html: We made a series of small LoRs nodes that use the petite 128x32 screen, which is automatically recognized but smashed. I'm dying to give these some life, and my goal would be to teach a soldering intro to Meshcore classes at Chaos Communication Congress with them if I could get a version of Meshcore working. Would anyone be up for getting limited support working on this Smoll screen? I can donate a bunch of hardware and some coffee funding for any help!
